title: Abridging the series somewhat
wikitext:
[]: Abridging the series... somewhat             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:09 pm ok, so this saturday, im showing Eva to a group of friends and i was thinking... why waste time? I was thinking that i should cut: ep 04, 07 (jet alone), 10 (magma diver), 11 (Matariel if i remember right). Epsiodes on my 'might' are : 13 (Iruel), 9 (Dance), I personally liked the Iruel thing but...eh.. The 4 that i mentioned, i feel that they dont add anything to the plot (i hated Magma diver and Jet alone) and no real anything. 04 might shed some light on Shinji's state... but still...eh comments and opinions please

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:15 pm Magma Diver develops the character relationship between Asuka and Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:25 pm thanks for your comment on a side note, in what episode does Kaji show Misato Lillith Hanging in Terminal Dogma? I dont want to cut that by accident

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:38 pm InvaderRen wrote: thanks for your comment on a side note, in what episode does Kaji show Misato Lillith Hanging in Terminal Dogma? I dont want to cut that by accident

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Oct 12, 2006 3:29 pm #4 is kinda important for Shinji's character.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Oct 12, 2006 3:43 pm too bad im not a video editor... i dont think my friends would appreciate me stopping in the mid of an episode... so reichu, what do YOU feel can be cut

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 4:47 pm Why do it all in one sitting? I managed to shove the entire series, and EoE into 2. EDIT=== Cut 21, nobody needs that one. 18 is also fairly worthless.

[]: Re: Abridging the series... somewhat             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 12, 2006 5:08 pm InvaderRen wrote: ep 04

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Thu Oct 12, 2006 6:06 pm I really liked episode 9. It had some crucial Asuka/Shinji development and also an awesome fight scene.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Oct 12, 2006 6:26 pm im not doing it in one sitting... imnot that crazy. its happening after we takethe SATs (wish me luck) so im expecting 3-5 hours of viewing didnt the fight with zeruel happen in18? or was is bardiel?

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Thu Oct 12, 2006 6:31 pm Bardiel is in 18, Zeruel is in 19.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Oct 12, 2006 6:34 pm cat42 wrote: Why do it all in one sitting? I managed to shove the entire series, and EoE into 2. EDIT=== Cut 21, nobody needs that one. 18 is also fairly worthless.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Oct 12, 2006 7:20 pm cat42 wrote: Cut 21.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 7:42 pm a bunch of people wrote: *not getting it*

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Oct 12, 2006 7:49 pm I suspected you were being facetious, but righteous outrage is just so much more fun.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Oct 12, 2006 8:27 pm cat42 wrote: a bunch of people wrote: *not getting it*

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 11:22 pm assÂ·hole (ăs'hōl') n. Vulgar Slang. 1. The anus. 2. A thoroughly contemptible, detestable person. 3. The most miserable or undesirable place in a particular area. (By the way, can you tell Yuko Ichihara is my hero today?)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 13, 2006 6:57 am InvaderRen wrote: so reichu, what do YOU feel can be cut

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Oct 13, 2006 10:20 am Episodes 9 and 10 also have "Both of You, Dance Like You Want to Win!" and "Magmadiver", respectively. Two great pieces of BGM that should not be missed. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Oct 13, 2006 10:55 am Don't cut anything; if you're going to run a marathon, you can't cut out a few miles. Show them 01-20 (OA), 21'-24' (DC), 25-26 (OA), and EoE. I prefer to watch Death in conjunction with EoE, but I suppose it's expendable when you've just watched the whole series, including the DC eps.
